Para adicionar:

SelectionSort.java

1. Atualizar a main
git checkout main
git pull origin main

2. Criar branch da feature
git checkout -b feature/selection-sort

3. Implementar
src/java/br/com/ifgoiano/algoritimos/sort/SelectionSort.java

4. Commitar
git add .
git commit -m "feat: add selection sort algorithm"

5. Enviar branch
git push origin feature/selection-sort
